title: Portfolio analytics
description: Multi-asset portfolio analytics: VaR gauge, factor exposures, stacked P&L, position parallel-coords, return distribution.

rows.title: Risk summary
rows.info: Rolling risk metrics aggregated across the full book. Hover any stat for its definition.

stats.label: Beta to SPX
stats.info: OLS beta of book P&L vs S&P 500 total return, trailing 60 biz days.

stats.label: Duration
stats.info: Book-weighted modified duration across rates positions.

stats.label: Gross leverage
stats.info: Sum of |notional| / equity. Risk limit is 3.0x.

stats.label: FX exposure
stats.info: Net FX delta translated back to USD.

stats.label: Max DD (1Y)
stats.info: Peak-to-trough drawdown of the combined book over the past year.

stats.label: Hit ratio
stats.info: Fraction of trading days with positive P&L, trailing 90 days.
